line: GROVE_RESULT:
Implemented ContextReset detection/handling end-to-end.
GROVE_ARTIFACTS:
- `crates/saw-core/src/types.rs:314` — added `compact_count`, incremented on main-session compact boundaries, and kept `last_event_was_compact` set until the next main-session tool call.

- `crates/saw-daemon/src/alerter.rs:308` — made `ContextReset` an alert phase with message `Context was compacted - earlier constraints may be lost`.

line: - To match the task/plan, compaction must remain active across ordinary user/token/file events and clear only after the next main-session tool call.

items: To match the task/plan, compaction must remain active across ordinary user/token/file events and clear only after the next main-session tool call.

line: GROVE_DECISIONS:
- Preserved current classifier priority: `Dead > ScopeLeaking > ContextReset > ...`.
